brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Use simple language and avoid jargon. Focus on the benefit, not the feature. Avoid: revolutionary, game-changing, and buzzwords. The first line should be a clear and concise statement that sets the tone for the rest of the content.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. It provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. The platform offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive more traffic to their website.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor your brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve your AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track your share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when your brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure your content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search
3x increase in content output while maintaining or improving engagement metrics

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
Difficulty competing with other brands for AI search visibility
Limited resources to dedicate to AI search optimization
messaging_angles: Get ahead of the competition with AI search optimization
Increase your online visibility and drive more traffic to your website
Stay ahead of the curve with the latest AI search trends and best practices
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

platform_rules_summary: Hook must be standalone in first 180 characters
3-5 hashtags at end only, never inline
Short paragraphs with blank line between each
content_brief.benchmark_reference: Industry benchmarks for data analytics and AI search optimization
content_brief.reasoning: With 6 distinct features and 5 pain points, a carousel is the best content type to showcase the product's capabilities and address the target audience's concerns. The minimal brand tone and presence of a strong stat support the use of a carousel. The proof point count of 3 also suggests that there is enough evidence to create a compelling narrative. Since the brand tone is minimal, a text post may not be the best fit, and the lack of a customer name makes a single image post less ideal. A carousel will allow us to provide a step-by-step guide to AI search optimization, highlighting the product's features and benefits, and establishing the brand as a thought leader in the data analytics space.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines daily
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands drive growth through AI search insights
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on traditional search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start by identifying the challenges of tracking AI search performance
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Get ahead of the competition with AI search optimization

linkedin_content.hook: Tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines is a daily challenge.
linkedin_content.body:
It takes a lot of time and effort to stay on top of it. This task can be overwhelming, especially when you have other pressing responsibilities.

Manually tracking AI search performance can be costly. It can take up to an hour every day, which is time you could spend on other important tasks. This can also lead to missed opportunities and a lack of insight into your brand's performance.

The cost of not effectively tracking AI search performance can be significant. You may miss out on opportunities to improve your brand's visibility and reputation. This can ultimately affect your business's bottom line and growth.

Searchable helps brands drive growth through AI search insights. It provides a simple and effective way to track brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines. This allows you to focus on other important tasks while staying on top of your brand's performance.

With Searchable, you can gain valuable insights into your brand's AI search performance. You can see how your brand is performing across different AI engines and identify areas for improvement. This enables you to make data-driven decisions to drive growth and improve your brand's visibility.

Searchable has already helped brands achieve significant improvements in their AI search performance. For example, some brands have seen a 206% share of voice improvements. This demonstrates the effectiveness of Searchable in driving growth through AI search insights.

By using Searchable, you can save time and effort while gaining valuable insights into your brand's performance. You can focus on other important tasks while staying on top of your brand's AI search performance. This allows you to drive growth and improve your brand's visibility and reputation.

Start your free trial today and see how Searchable can help you drive growth through AI search insights. Take the first step towards improving your brand's AI search performance and gaining a competitive edge. Sign up now and start achieving better results for your brand.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, and the structure is clear, but some sentences are a bit long and could be broken up for better flow. The hook is a clear statement of a daily challenge, but it's a fairly generic pain point and doesn't create strong curiosity or urgency. The copy uses simple language, focuses on benefits, and avoids jargon and buzzwords, perfectly matching the writing instruction. The copy uses the provided proof point (206% share of voice improvements) verbatim and does not invent any statistics, making it entirely accurate.
